prompt: Compare vehicles VEH-6700 and VEH-9700; report each name, reservation date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. The second vehicle is comparison-only and must remain untouched.

follow_up_turns.content: For Outreach bus 4 (VEH-6700) only, set the reservation date to 2026-11-23. Leave VEH-9700 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for VEH-6700: set the reservation date to 2026-12-27, not 2026-11-23. The other vehicle must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first reservation date.
Replace the superseded reservation date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both reservation date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected reservation date as current and the first requested reservation date as superseded.
Do not state or imply that the comparison vehicle or any related record was modified.
